title: Yowray #3140
definition:
Jorai = "Jehovah has taught me"

 1) one of the Gadites dwelling at Gilead in Bashan in the reign of
    king Jotham of Judah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jorai = "Jehovah has taught me"

 1) one of the Gadites dwelling at Gilead in Bashan in the reign of
    king Jotham of Judah

    NASB:  He teaches, a Gadite
